title: JK Tyre is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: JK Tyre is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? JK Tyre in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About JK Tyre:
JK Tyre is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JK Tyre!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
